2605.29380.title: TRACER: Persistent Regularization for Robust Multimodal Finetuning
2605.29380.paper_summary: Mainstream strategies for finetuning pretrained multimodal models often degrade out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness, a phenomenon known as catastrophic forgetting. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework for multimodal contrastive finetuning, yielding closed-form solutions and a geometric decomposition for each strategy. This framework shows that self-distillation is more effective than other regularization approaches to retain the knowledge of the pretrained model. Our analysis reveals a largely overlooked limitation: standard Exponential Moving Average (EMA) teachers, widely used in robust finetuning, suffer from collapse. To solve this, we prove that a Weighted Moving Average (WMA) teacher maintains a persistent regularizing force over finite horizons and yields bias-free convergence in the task subspace while preserving orthogonal knowledge. These insights motivate **TRACER** (**T**rajectory-**R**obust **A**nchoring for **C**ontrastive **E**ncoder **R**egularization), which combines contrastive learning with WMA-guided multi-perspective distillation. Extensive experiments on CLIP finetuning demonstrate consistent OOD accuracy and calibration gains across three backbone architectures, and comprehensive ablations confirm that TRACER is both principled and robust to hyperparameter choices. Code is available at [https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER](https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER).
2605.29380.paper_summary_zh: 主流的微調預訓練多模態模型的策略往往會降低對分佈外（OOD）穩健性的強度，這一現象被稱為災難性遺忘。<lb/>在本文中，我們開發了一個多模態對比微調的理論框架，為每種策略提供了封閉形式的解和幾何分解。<lb/>這個框架顯示，自我蒸餾比其他正則化方法更有效地保留預訓練模型的知識。<lb/>我們的分析揭示了一個被大多數人忽視的限制：標準的指數移動平均（EMA）教師在穩健微調中廣泛使用，但卻遭遇崩潰。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們證明加權移動平均（WMA）教師在有限的時間範圍內保持持久的正則化力量，並在任務子空間中實現無偏收斂，同時保留正交知識。<lb/>這些見解促使了**TRACER**（**T**rajectory-**R**obust **A**nchoring for **C**ontrastive **E**ncoder **R**egularization）的誕生，它將對比學習與WMA引導的多視角蒸餾相結合。<lb/>在CLIP微調上的廣泛實驗顯示，三種主幹架構的一致OOD準確性和校準增益，並且全面的消融實驗確認TRACER在超參數選擇上既有原則性又穩健。<lb/>代碼可在[https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER](https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER)獲得。
2605.29380.author: Hesam Asadollahzadeh et.al.
2605.29380.authors: Hesam Asadollahzadeh, Feng Liu, Christopher Leckie, Sarah M. Erfani
